sqlReaderQuery.value:
select * from @{pipeline().parameters.src_schema_name}.@{pipeline().parameters.src_tbl_name} where booking_date > '@{activity('Lookup_load_date').output.firstRow.lastload}' and 
booking_date <= '@{activity('latest_load').output.firstRow.latestload}'
SELECT last_modified_date as last_date from @{pipeline().parameters.lkp_schema}.@{pipeline().parameters.lkp_table_name} where table_name = '@{pipeline().parameters.src_table_name}';

select * from @{pipeline().parameters.src_schema}.@{pipeline().parameters.src_table_name}  where booking_date > '@{activity('Lookup_OldTime').output.value[0].last_date}' and booking_date <= '@{activity('lookup_new_time').output.value[0].new_date}'
